---
title: Omniflow
author: Eric Julianto
format:
    revealjs:
        theme: white
        css: custom.css
        resources: [logo-white.png]
        slide-number: c/t
        chalkboard:
            buttons: false
        transition: slide
        background-transition: fade
        smaller: false
        incremental: false
        preview-links: auto
        logo: "logo.png"
        footer: "Omniflow · omniflow.id"
        margin: 0.1
        fig-responsive: true
        highlight-style: github
        html-math-method: katex
---

# Omniflow {#cover background-color="#0f172a"}

![](./images/logo_optimized.png){.logo-mark}

<div class="eyebrow">Integrated ERP · Built for Growth</div>

<p class="cover-tagline">One Ecosystem.<br>Every Function.<br>One Flow.</p>

<p class="lead">Omniflow unifies operations, finance, HR, sales, and analytics into a single modular platform — so decisions are faster, operations are cleaner, and growth is more measurable.</p>

<div class="hero-kpis">
<div class="metric-card"><span class="metric-value">18+</span><span class="metric-label">Integrated Modules</span></div>
<div class="metric-card"><span class="metric-value">10,000+</span><span class="metric-label">Active Users</span></div>
<div class="metric-card"><span class="metric-value">99.9%</span><span class="metric-label">SLA Uptime</span></div>
</div>

## The Challenge {#problem}

<div class="eyebrow">Problem Landscape</div>

<p class="lead">Most companies grow faster than their operational systems can keep up — data silos, manual processes, and zero real-time visibility.</p>

<div class="row-list">
<div class="row-item"><span class="row-num">01</span><div><h3>Data fragmented across tools</h3><p>HR, finance, sales, and operations run on separate apps with no shared data layer.</p></div></div>
<div class="row-item"><span class="row-num">02</span><div><h3>Manual processes block growth</h3><p>Approvals, reports, and data transfers still depend on spreadsheets and manual follow-ups.</p></div></div>
<div class="row-item"><span class="row-num">03</span><div><h3>No real-time visibility</h3><p>Leadership reads performance data too late — consolidated only at period-end.</p></div></div>
<div class="row-item"><span class="row-num">04</span><div><h3>Complexity grows with scale</h3><p>As companies expand, process duplication, software costs, and coordination gaps multiply.</p></div></div>
</div>

# One Platform. One Flow. {#divider-flow .divider background-color="#0f172a"}

<div class="eyebrow">Omniflow Approach</div>

<p class="divider-sub">A modular ERP platform that unifies every core business process — from front office to back office.</p>

## What is Omniflow {#solution}

<div class="split-layout">
<div class="split-left">
<div class="eyebrow">Enterprise ERP Ecosystem</div>
<h3>One platform to run your business end-to-end</h3>
<p>Omniflow is an integrated ERP that connects HR, accounting, sales, inventory, procurement, CRM, learning, analytics, and more — all within a single, unified work ecosystem.</p>
<ul class="check-list">
<li>Modular — start from what matters most right now</li>
<li>Integrated — data flows across teams without manual transfers</li>
<li>Scalable — built to grow with your business</li>
<li>Visible — critical data available in real time</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div>
<div class="stack-list">
<div class="stack-item"><strong>For executives & management</strong>Better control over performance, costs, and growth priorities.</div>
<div class="stack-item"><strong>For operations teams</strong>Workflows that are consistent, faster, and less error-prone.</div>
<div class="stack-item"><strong>For data & IT teams</strong>Structured integration and stronger data visibility.</div>
</div>
<div class="stat-strip">
<div class="stat-pill"><strong>90%</strong><span>less complexity</span></div>
<div class="stat-pill"><strong>3×</strong><span>faster decisions</span></div>
<div class="stat-pill"><strong>40%</strong><span>cost reduction</span></div>
<div class="stat-pill"><strong>60%</strong><span>productivity gain</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

## Platform Modules {#modules}

<div class="eyebrow">Core Modules</div>

<p class="lead">A comprehensive suite of integrated modules — configurable to fit your transformation priorities.</p>

<div class="module-rows">
<div class="module-row"><span class="module-tag">HRIS</span><h3>Human Capital</h3><p>Payroll, attendance, performance, leave, and employee records in one workflow.</p></div>
<div class="module-row"><span class="module-tag">ACC</span><h3>Accounting</h3><p>Invoicing, cashflow, financial reports, and compliance controls — streamlined.</p></div>
<div class="module-row"><span class="module-tag">XRM</span><h3>XRM & Sales</h3><p>Pipeline management, customer relationships, forecasting, and follow-ups.</p></div>
<div class="module-row"><span class="module-tag">POS</span><h3>Commerce & POS</h3><p>Run online and physical sales with fully synchronized data.</p></div>
<div class="module-row"><span class="module-tag">INV</span><h3>Inventory & Assets</h3><p>Multi-location stock, asset lifecycle, maintenance, and warehouse control.</p></div>
<div class="module-row"><span class="module-tag">PRC</span><h3>Purchasing</h3><p>Vendor control, RFQ, procurement workflow, and purchase cost optimization.</p></div>
<div class="module-row"><span class="module-tag">LMS</span><h3>Learning Management</h3><p>Internal training and knowledge enablement to accelerate team capability.</p></div>
<div class="module-row"><span class="module-tag">BI</span><h3>Analytics</h3><p>Centralized dashboards to read cross-functional performance at a glance.</p></div>
<div class="module-row"><span class="module-tag">API</span><h3>Integration Layer</h3><p>Connect Omniflow to your existing stack via an API-first architecture.</p></div>
</div>

## Integration & Data Visibility {#integration}

<div class="integration-layout">
<div class="row-list">
<div class="row-item"><span class="row-num">A</span><div><h3>Single source of truth</h3><p>Operational, transactional, and performance data — no longer scattered across tools.</p></div></div>
<div class="row-item"><span class="row-num">B</span><div><h3>Connects with popular platforms</h3><p>Omniflow integrates with the systems your business already relies on.</p></div></div>
</div>
<div class="row-list">
<div class="row-item"><span class="row-num">C</span><div><h3>Actionable dashboards</h3><p>Leadership and operations monitor key indicators — no waiting for manual reports.</p></div></div>
<div class="row-item"><span class="row-num">D</span><div><h3>Flexible modular architecture</h3><p>Start from the most urgent need, then expand as your business evolves.</p></div></div>
</div>
</div>

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    A[Sales & CRM] --> D[Omniflow Core]
    B[Finance & Accounting] --> D
    C[HRIS & Operations] --> D
    D --> E[Analytics Dashboard]
    D --> F[Approval Workflow]
    D --> G[Integration Layer]
    G --> H[Marketplace / POS / Payment]
    G --> I[Existing Enterprise Systems]

    style D fill:#1d4ed8,color:#ffffff,stroke:#1e3a8a
    style E fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#60a5fa
    style F fill:#e0e7ff,stroke:#818cf8
    style G fill:#eff6ff,stroke:#3b82f6
```

# Measurable Business Impact {#divider-impact .divider background-color="#0f172a"}

<div class="eyebrow">Business Outcomes</div>

<p class="divider-sub">Omniflow doesn't just digitize your processes — it transforms how your company works.</p>

## Why Omniflow {#benefits}

<div class="eyebrow">Why Omniflow</div>

<p class="lead">Built for companies that want to grow without adding system complexity.</p>

<div class="stat-rows">
<div class="stat-row"><span class="stat-big">90%</span><div class="stat-row-text"><h3>All-in-One Solution</h3><p>All core processes run in one connected system — no disconnected tools.</p></div></div>
<div class="stat-row"><span class="stat-big">3×</span><div class="stat-row-text"><h3>Real-time Analytics</h3><p>Business insights immediately available to help management move with precision.</p></div></div>
<div class="stat-row"><span class="stat-big">100K+</span><div class="stat-row-text"><h3>Scalable Architecture</h3><p>Built to grow with your business — no forced migrations as you scale.</p></div></div>
<div class="stat-row"><span class="stat-big">40%</span><div class="stat-row-text"><h3>Cost Efficiency</h3><p>Cut complexity costs, duplicate licenses, and unnecessary overhead.</p></div></div>
<div class="stat-row"><span class="stat-big">60%</span><div class="stat-row-text"><h3>Productivity Gains</h3><p>Teams focus on value-adding work — not manual data entry and reconciliation.</p></div></div>
<div class="stat-row"><span class="stat-big">ISO</span><div class="stat-row-text"><h3>Enterprise-Grade Security</h3><p>Your business data protected under ISO 27001 enterprise-grade security standards.</p></div></div>
</div>

## Implementation Journey {#implementation}

<div class="eyebrow">Delivery Model</div>

<p class="lead">Realistic implementation — starting from priority needs, aligned to your processes, then grown incrementally.</p>

<div class="steps">
<div class="step"><div class="step-num">01</div><h3>Discovery & Process Mapping</h3><p>Understand current workflows, key bottlenecks, business goals, and highest-impact improvement areas.</p></div>
<div class="step"><div class="step-num">02</div><h3>Solution Design</h3><p>Define priority modules, integration requirements, data architecture, and a realistic scope.</p></div>
<div class="step"><div class="step-num">03</div><h3>Setup, Migration & Integration</h3><p>Configure the system, migrate critical data, and connect with your existing infrastructure.</p></div>
<div class="step"><div class="step-num">04</div><h3>Training & Go-Live Support</h3><p>Train key users, ensure strong adoption, and provide hands-on support through launch.</p></div>
</div>

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    A[Discovery] --> B[Blueprint]
    B --> C[Configuration]
    C --> D[Migration & Integration]
    D --> E[Training]
    E --> F[Go Live]
    F --> G[Optimization]

    style A fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#60a5fa
    style B fill:#e0e7ff,stroke:#818cf8
    style C fill:#eff6ff,stroke:#3b82f6
    style D fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#60a5fa
    style E fill:#e0e7ff,stroke:#818cf8
    style F fill:#1d4ed8,color:#ffffff,stroke:#1e3a8a
    style G fill:#0f172a,color:#ffffff,stroke:#1e293b
```

## Frequently Asked Questions {#faq}

<div class="faq-list">
<div class="faq-item"><h3>How is Omniflow different from other ERPs?</h3><p>Omniflow combines comprehensive modules, powerful integration, and a modern enterprise UX — all in one cohesive platform.</p></div>
<div class="faq-item"><h3>How long does implementation take?</h3><p>Core implementation can begin within weeks. Enterprise scope is structured in phases aligned to your business priorities and integration complexity.</p></div>
<div class="faq-item"><h3>Can it be tailored for different industries?</h3><p>Yes. The modular approach supports manufacturing, retail, distribution, F&B, education, healthcare, and more.</p></div>
<div class="faq-item"><h3>What about security and support?</h3><p>Enterprise-grade security controls, 99.9% uptime SLA, and dedicated support through implementation and beyond.</p></div>
</div>

# Let's Build Your Unified Operations {#divider-contact .divider background-color="#0f172a"}

<div class="eyebrow">Next Step</div>

<p class="divider-sub">From fragmented processes — to an integrated, scalable work system.</p>

## Get in Touch {#contact}

<div class="contact-list">
<div class="contact-item"><div class="c-label">Mail</div><h3>Email</h3><p><strong>contact@omniflow.id</strong></p><p>Reach out for a demo, consultation, or to discuss your enterprise needs.</p></div>
<div class="contact-item"><div class="c-label">Call</div><h3>Phone</h3><p><strong>+62 821 2560 9413</strong></p><p>Our team is available on business days for enterprise inquiries.</p></div>
<div class="contact-item"><div class="c-label">Visit</div><h3>Office</h3><p><strong>PT. Algonacci Sobat Nusantara</strong></p><p>Jl. Letjen S. Parman No. 28, Grogol Petamburan, Jakarta Barat 11470.</p></div>
</div>

::: {.callout-tip}
### Recommended First Step
Start with a focused discovery workshop — map your processes, identify priority modules, and set your first 90-day implementation goals.
:::

## {#qa}

<div class="qa-slide">

![](./images/any-question.png){width=220 style="border:none;box-shadow:none;background:transparent;"}

### Thank you for your time.

<p class="lead">We'd love to show you what Omniflow can do for your business.</p>

</div>
